mapper.update: UPDATE categories SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, icon = #{icon}, sort = #{sort}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE categories SET status = 0, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM categories WHERE status != 0
SELECT id, name, description, icon, sort, status, created_at, updated_at FROM categories ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE categories SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, icon = #{icon}, sort = #{sort}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE categories SET status = 0, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{categoryId}
